description: deCONZ — standalone Zigbee gateway (ConBee II) + native Hue-bridge API. See README.md / INSTALL.md.

ports.description: deCONZ REST + Hue-compat API (Phoscon UI via proxy; SysAP Hue control INTRA-zone iotCloud; HA REST cross-zone srvHome->iotCloud)
deCONZ websocket (HA deconz integration live events) — cross-zone srvHome->iotCloud pinhole
SSDP discovery — SysAP finds the Hue-emulated bridge INTRA-zone (iotCloud); no cross-zone relay (ADR-COM-0006)
